title: oldenlandia butensis
intro: Oldenlandia butensis, also known as Kunbu or Butterscotch grass, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to tropical Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Oldenlandia butensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit anti-diabetic properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infused in water, and in some cases, used in combination with other herbs to create herbal preparations, such as tonics or teas, to harness its medicinal properties.
